passiveAbilities.name: Slow
passiveAbilities.description: This model's Jog actions are limited to 2”.

passiveAbilities.name: My Boys
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Dmg this character would suffer by -1 for each other friendly Gnome within 4”, to a maximum of -2.

passiveAbilities.name: Luck Charms
passiveAbilities.description: Other friendly Gnomes within 4” gain +1 Melee stat, +1 Arcane stat.

activeAbilities.name: Mother's Wrath
activeAbilities.description: Other friendly Gnomes within the pulse gain 1 energy. Enemy models within the pulse suffer 2 Wds.

activeAbilities.name: Mother's Love
activeAbilities.description: Move 2” directly towards target Gnome, then the target moves 2” directly towards this model and restores 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
[B]X: Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: You'll Regret That
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this model is still alive, swap the positions of this model and a friendly model within 4”.
